response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified VTubers in the talk segment (00:00-02:42). 2. Observed the start of the music performance at 02:42. 3. Identified the song title 'Chromatic Future' from on-screen graphics during the concert. 4. Searched for 'Chromatic Future Hololive' to confirm metadata. 5. Transcribed the lyrics directly from the performance in the video as an official lyric sheet was unavailable in searches.
response.global_summary: The video shows an introductory conversational segment featuring Kobo Kanaeru, Usada Pekora, and Takanashi Kiara, followed by a vocal performance of the original Hololive Indonesia concert song 'Chromatic Future', performed by members of Hololive Indonesia.

scenes.description: Introductory talk segment featuring VTubers Kobo Kanaeru, Usada Pekora, and Takanashi Kiara discussing their excitement for the concert.
A musical performance of 'Chromatic Future' by Hololive Indonesia members. The song features a mix of English and Indonesian lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: Everything was easy, I did it all alone, so effortlessly, I spread my wings and let my magic unfold, got all problems solved, without any setbacks, there is nothing uncontrolled. There's no way I can begin, dream life that I need to win, I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces. I know I gotta soar a little higher, hope all turns to be the things I desire. Layak-nya burung merak yang bersayap, kan ku taklukkan gelap, dengan sihir angin kan ku ajak, semua yang terlelap tuk bangkit melawan dunia. We'll never give up, as long as we got the strength in ourselves, we could rise above the pain, we're stronger than that. Walking step by step, trusting my own pace, giving me what I deserve to have. Let's go!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Everything was easy, I did it all alone, so effortlessly, I spread my wings and let my magic unfold, got all problems solved, without any setbacks, there is nothing uncontrolled. There's no way I can begin, dream life that I need to win, I need to feel how all these things crumble into little pieces. I know I gotta soar a little higher, hope all turns to be the things I desire. Layak-nya burung merak yang bersayap, kan ku taklukkan gelap, dengan sihir angin kan ku ajak, semua yang terlelap tuk bangkit melawan dunia. We'll never give up, as long as we got the strength in ourselves, we could rise above the pain, we're stronger than that. Walking step by step, trusting my own pace, giving me what I deserve to have. Let's go!
